summary: Service orchestrates message summarization pipeline: fetches unsummarized messages, calls LLM, stores results
side_effects: calls storage.Store for message and channel operations
notes: Matches hint: Service struct (NewService) with 5 public functions. Orchestrates fetching unsummarized messages, calling LLM via Client interface, storing results to storage. Implements 150-char threshold: short messages copied verbatim without LLM call. Time window filters messages from yesterday+today UTC. SummarizeUnsummarizedForChannels allows filtering by specific channel IDs. WithLocalModel() option adds preamble for local LLM inference.
